ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of carefully holding and delivering a package.  The robot will use both arms to cradle the imaginary package, then move it forward to simulate a delivery.  The movement should be deliberate and careful, reflecting the responsibility of handling a delivery.  The robot's arms, lacking elbows, will achieve this through a combination of shoulder rotations and slight wrist adjustments. I will check examples to ensure the movements are smooth and natural within the robot's capabilities.

frames.beat: arms cradle a package close to the chest
arms lift the package slightly, preparing to move
arms extend forward, delivering the package carefully
arms return to sides, the delivery is complete
